utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Luckily , the guy she settled for can not hear what you are talking about .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Um , and maybe I am wrong !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I but ... you know I am gonna go out with him again , I will find out more .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You believe that this guy is destined for someone else and you are still gonna date him ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_You believe that this guy is destined for someone else and you are still gonna date him ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , he may not be my soul mate , but a girl gotta eat .
